summary: Matrix‑mix recording (mostly soundboard) delivers a stellar show with an epic Other One, soaring Comes A Time and standout Sugaree.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance – the first set is solid with highlights like Supplication, Sugaree and Eyes of the World, while the second set shines with one of the best The Other One ever heard, a beautifully emotional Comes A Time and powerful Samson & Delilah. The recording is primarily soundboard quality and very clear, though later portions fall back to audience (AUD) patches that are a bit less crisp.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 5‑star reviews praise both the musical performance and the mostly excellent soundboard recording, only noting minor audience‑only sections.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp soundboard for most of the show; later portions (Comes A Time onward) are sourced from audience patches and sound a bit muffled, but overall very listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set builds nicely with solid jams and strong vocals; second set delivers a high‑energy peak, highlighted by an unforgettable Other One that flows into a heartfelt Comes A Time.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Voice is described as excellent throughout; his singing drives the show.
band_member_comments.Drums: Brief drum break noted, no complaints about performance.
